testsuite.name: ua.crowpi.projects.p07.GreenhouseTest
testsuite.system-out: [OVERRIDE] Pump forced → ON [CONTROLLER] soil=60% (min=40), temp=22.0C (max=30.0), forced=true → pump=ON, fan=OFF [CONTROLLER] soil=20% (min=40), temp=35.0C (max=30.0), forced=false → pump=ON, fan=ON [CONTROLLER] soil=60% (min=40), temp=22.0C (max=30.0), forced=false → pump=OFF, fan=OFF [CONTROLLER] soil=20% (min=40), temp=22.0C (max=30.0), forced=false → pump=ON, fan=OFF [CONTROLLER] soil=60% (min=40), temp=35.0C (max=30.0), forced=false → pump=OFF, fan=ON
